scripts.build-run:cli: bun run build:cli && bun run packages/cli/dist/koincode
scripts.link:cli: bun run build:cli && cd packages/cli && bun link
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared tsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/cli tsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/server tsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/vscode-extension tsc --noEmit
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --prefix packages/cli && git add -A && git commit -m "release: v$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version") && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --prefix packages/cli && git add -A && git commit -m "release: v$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version") && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major --prefix packages/cli && git add -A && git commit -m "release: v$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version") && git push && git push --tags
scripts.publish:cli: bun run build:cli && cd packages/cli && npm publish --access public
